disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe throbbing whole-head headache that is worst on waking this morning
trigger_question_examples: When did the headache start and when is it worst?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a really bad throbbing headache all over my head — it was at its worst the moment I woke up this morning.

trigger_question_examples: How is his energy this morning?
Is he more tired or drowsy than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's completely wiped out — far more exhausted than a normal cold would make him.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Weak, ineffective cough — unable to clear chest secretions
trigger_question_examples: Is he able to cough the phlegm up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He keeps trying to cough but it's weak and nothing comes up — he can't shift the phlegm at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathing was unusually shallow overnight and the BiPAP mask was repeatedly removed because of nasal congestion
trigger_question_examples: How did he sleep and did he use his breathing mask overnight?
Was his breathing different during the night?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His breathing looked really shallow overnight, and he kept pulling the mask off because his nose was so blocked from the cold.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fast, shallow breathing and only able to speak in short sentences
trigger_question_examples: How is his breathing right now?
Can he speak in full sentences?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's breathing fast and shallow and can only get a few words out at a time before he needs a breath.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent mild viral upper-respiratory infection over the preceding 24 hours
trigger_question_examples: Any cold or cough in the last few days?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's had a mild cold for about a day — runny nose, a bit of a cough.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Home fingertip-oximeter reading of 90% on room air with a pulse of about 115
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a home oximeter — what does it read?
What is his oxygen level and pulse this morning?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His fingertip oximeter says 90% and a pulse around 115.
His temperature is only 37.4 — no real fever.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Owns and normally uses a home cough-assist (mechanical insufflation-exsufflation) device and a nocturnal BiPAP machine
trigger_question_examples: What breathing equipment do you have at home?
Does he use a cough machine or a breathing mask?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, he has a cough-assist machine and a BiPAP mask he wears at night.
